title: The Chaos Mod
description: A mod that adds many new aspects to minecraft
body:
The Chaos Mod Revamp allows you to delve into an RPG feeling minecraft experience. As of yet there are only armor and tools for the chaos and caprice tiers. The Chaos tier is better than diamond and the armor has some cool effects. The Caprice tier is higher than the Chaos tier. 2 new Mobs: An Infected Steve and A Chaotic pig (the chaotic pig is rideable and can be directed/tempted with a carrot). 1 New Boss! The Chaotic Wither. (the chaotic Wither drops caprice shards which are used just as the chaos tier but it gets you caprice gems, rods and stone.)

Current Tiers:

- Chaos
- Caprice
- Ire
- Imp
- Litost
- Deditionem
- Laska
- Rainbow

By tier I mean a set of:

- A dimension
- A full toolset
- a Full armor set
- A Shard
- A Gem
- A Stone
- An ore

 

How to start:

Find chaos ore down near bedrock (it should be plentiful). 9 chaos shards make one chaos gem. 9 chaos gems make one chaos stone.

 

You can use Chaos Stone in a nether portal frame to make the portal to the Caprice Dimension.

You will need the Chaotic Burner to light it though. Here's the crafting:
| | | |
|-- | -- | -- |
|S|S|S|
|S|I|S|
| |I| |

S=chaos stone, I = chaotic rod.

 

2 chaos gems on top of each other makes one chaos rod. Chaos rods and chaos gems make the chaos tools where the chaos rods are the sticks and the chaos gems are the material. The armor is made with chaos stone. All tiers are the same.

To spawn the Chaotic Wither you need 4 chaos gems and one end stone.

The crafting recipe is as follows:

| | | |
|--|--|-- |
| |G| |
|G|S|G|
| |G| |

G = chaos gem. S = End Stone.

If there is any topic I still have yet to cover please pm me so I can fix it.

The original mod is only for 1.6.4 but it can be found here http://minecraft.curseforge.com/mc-mods/73001-chaos-mod

Technical Stats:

this mod is universal (the same file that works in client will work with server).
